name: AUTOZONE INC
summary: PARTI Introduction AutoZone,Inc. (AutoZone, the Company, we, our or us) is a leading retailer and distributor of automotive replacement parts and accessories in the Americas. We began operations in 1979 and at August30, 2025, operated 6,627 stores in the United States (U.S.), 883 stores in Mexico and 147 stores in Brazil. Each store carries an extensive product line for cars, sport utility vehicles, vans and light duty trucks, including new and remanufactured automotive hard parts, maintenance i...
